collection.levelSubmarineDesc:
Where did everyone go?!
Call in the search-sub to help reveal the hidden buddies!
collection.levelSubmarineChallengeDesc: finish the search with limited sonar!
collection.levelMovementDesc: Watch closely and find all of the fidgeting friends!
collection.levelMovementChallengeDesc: Finish the search with less than 5 misses!
collection.levelBubblesDesc: Spot the buddies in the level to fill your shelves with friends!
collection.levelBubblesChallengeDesc: Finish the search within the time limit!
collection.levelXRayDesc: Hunt for the krabby patties and the buddies who ate them! Don’t forget your x-ray glasses!
collection.levelFishDesc: Lights out! Get help from a hungry anglerfish to find buddies in the darkness!
collection.levelFishChallengeDesc: Finish the search with limited angler-chow!
collection.completeNormalModeToPlayChallenge: Finish normal mode search to unlock.
collection.completePreviousChallengeToUnlock: Finish previous challenge mode to unlock.
collection.completePreviousSearches: Complete all previous searches to unlock!

rewards.heading: rewards
rewards.body:
you completed the ultimate bikini bottom buddy search!

You’ve earned a special download and a chance to enter an exclusive contest!

instructions.heading: HOW TO PLAY
instructions.levelBubblesSlide1:
Move around the map and spot the buddies, collect all buddies from the display case to complete the search!

Look for bubbles to help you find the right buddy. Click on them to collect them.
instructions.levelBubblesSlide2:
In challenge mode, You have a limited amount of time to search.

Keep your eyes peeled and find all the buddies before the timer runs out!
instructions.levelBubblesSlide1Mob:
Move around the map and spot the buddies, collect all buddies from the display case to complete the search!

Look for bubbles to help you find the right buddy. TAP on them to collect them.
instructions.levelBubblesSlide2Mob:
In challenge mode, You have a limited amount of time to search.

Keep your eyes peeled and find all the buddies before the timer runs out!
instructions.levelMovementSlide1:
THe buddies you’re LOOKING for want their FACES kept secret.

Luckily for you, they can’T keep still, so try to spot the buds with moving parts!

Click on them to collect them.
instructions.levelMovementSlide2:
In challenge mode, you can only guess wrong a certain amount of times.

Make sure you’ve got the right buddy in your sights before you click!
instructions.levelMovementSlide1Mob:
THe buddies you’re LOOKING for want their FACES kept secret.

Luckily for you, they can’T keep still, so try to spot the buds with moving parts!

TAP on them to collect them.
instructions.levelMovementSlide2Mob:
In challenge mode, you can only guess wrong a certain amount of times.

Make sure you’ve got the right buddy in your sights before you tap!
instructions.levelFishSlide1:
Click the angler-chow button to feed anglerfish.

Once it chows down, anglerfish will light up the whole map for you to spot and collect buddies!
instructions.levelFishSlide2:
In challenge mode, you have a limited amount of angler-chow.

Use it wisely to make sure you have enough to light up all the buddies!
instructions.levelFishSlide1Mob:
Tap the angler-chow button to feed anglerfish.

Once it chows down, anglerfish will light up the whole map for you to spot and collect buddies!
instructions.levelFishSlide2Mob:
In challenge mode, you have a limited amount of angler-chow.

Use it wisely to make sure you have enough to light up all the buddies!
instructions.levelXRaySlide1:
Click the x-ray glasses button to get x-ray vision for a limited time.

Find the buddies who have eaten krabby patties to collect them!
instructions.levelXRaySlide2:
In challenge mode, the number of times you can put on your x-ray glasses is limited.

Make every x-ray count and find all the patty-eating pals!
instructions.levelXRaySlide1Mob:
TAP the x-ray glasses button to get x-ray vision for a limited time.

Find the buddies who have eaten krabby patties to collect them!
instructions.levelXRaySlide2Mob:
In challenge mode, the number of times you can put on your x-ray glasses is limited.

Make every x-ray count and find all the patty-eating pals!
instructions.levelSubmarineSlide1:
Steer the sub around using the arrow keys on your keyboard.

Click the radar button to use your sonar, look for sonar waves that bounce off the friends you need to find. Also look for hints on the radar!
instructions.levelSubmarineSlide2:
in challenge mode, the sub’s sonar has limited uses!

Try to use strategy with your sonar to make sure no buddy goes unfound!
instructions.levelSubmarineSlide1Mob:
Steer the sub around by touching and dragging in any direction.

TAP the radar button to use your sonar, look for sonar waves that bounce off the friends you need to find. Also look for hints on the radar!
instructions.levelSubmarineSlide2Mob:
in challenge mode, the sub’s sonar has limited uses!

Try to use strategy with your sonar to make sure no buddy goes unfound!

results.levelBubblesComplete:
buddy search success!
No one can hide from friendship!
results.levelMovementComplete:
You found every moving buddy!
No moves get past you!
results.levelSubmarineComplete:
You found every buddy!
Your eyeballs have skills!
results.levelXRayComplete:
You spotted every hungry buddy!
Friendship is more than skin deep.
results.levelFishComplete:
You shed light on every buddy!
Fine fish-food flinging!
results.challengeModeGold:
CHALLENGE MODE COMPLETE!
YOU EARNED THE GOLD MEDAL.
results.challengeModeSilver:
CHALLENGE MODE COMPLETE!
YOU EARNED THE SILVER MEDAL.
results.challengeModeBronze:
CHALLENGE MODE COMPLETE!
YOU EARNED THE BRONZE MEDAL.
results.challengeModeNoMedal:
CHALLENGE MODE FAILED!
TRY AGAIN TO EARN A MEDAL.
